translation.home.heroSubtitle: Access the world's most powerful AI models through a single API endpoint. Simple, affordable, reliable.
translation.home.whyChooseUsDesc: Everything you need to build AI-powered applications
translation.home.lightningFastDesc: Optimized routing and caching deliver responses with minimal latency. Load-balanced across multiple providers for maximum reliability.
translation.home.securePrivateDesc: Enterprise-grade security with encrypted API keys. No request logging by default. Your data stays your data.
translation.home.payAsYouGoDesc: Transparent pricing with no hidden fees. Only pay for what you use. Multiple top-up options and subscription packages available.
translation.home.availableModelsDesc: Access {{count}} AI models through a unified API
translation.home.choosePlan: Choose a plan that fits your needs
translation.home.readyToStartDesc: Create your account and start building with AI in minutes. No credit card required.
translation.home.apiEndpointsDesc: After creating an API key, use any of these URLs. Pick the endpoint closest to your network.
translation.home.apiEndpointClickToCopy: Click an address to copy it
translation.register.fillRequired: Please fill in all required fields
translation.dashboard.manageDesc: Manage your API usage, keys, and account
translation.notifications.title: Announcements
translation.notifications.subtitle: Latest updates from the site owner
translation.subDist.dashboardEntry: Launch a relay site you can price and promote
translation.subDist.title: Build Your Own AI API Relay Site
translation.subDist.subtitle: Use {{name}}'s hosted platform to launch an independent relay site that can be visited, paid into, priced, and promoted. After payment, management access is enabled automatically and setup continues.
translation.subDist.exampleTitle: See what this site already looks like
translation.subDist.exampleDesc: {{name}} already supports branding, top-ups, model sales, and user management. Your relay site runs on the same hosted capability.
translation.subDist.exampleNote: You are not only getting an admin account. You are launching an AI API relay site that can be visited, accept payments, set prices, and be promoted.
translation.subDist.notAvailable: Relay site setup is currently unavailable
translation.subDist.disabledFallback: Please contact the site administrator to enable this feature
translation.subDist.loginHint: Please log in or register on this site first. After payment succeeds, this account will automatically receive management access for the new relay site.
translation.subDist.siteSlugHelp: This will become your relay site identifier and cannot be changed after payment.
translation.subDist.postPayHint: After payment, activation is automatic. If login is required, use the same account to continue setup.
translation.subDist.cryptoHint: Please transfer using the details below. Your relay site will be activated automatically after confirmation and setup will begin.
translation.subDist.priceSummary: This is the actual setup price configured by this site's owner. After payment succeeds, the system activates your relay site automatically and enters setup.
translation.subDist.rule1: An AI API relay site that can be visited independently, customized with your brand, and topped up online.
translation.subDist.rule2: After activation, you can configure the domain, site name, logo, announcements, theme, and model pricing.
translation.subDist.rule3: Customer management, top-ups, packages, and model sales are enabled with the site and managed from the admin console.
translation.subDist.loginRequired: Please log in before building your relay site
translation.subDist.fillRequired: Please fill in the site name, slug, and payment method
translation.subDist.paymentPageOpened: Setup order created. Please complete payment on the opened payment page.
translation.subDist.paymentPageFailed: Failed to open the payment page. Please try again later or contact the site administrator.
translation.subDist.popupBlocked: The browser blocked the payment window. Please allow pop-ups and try again.
translation.subDist.cryptoOrderCreated: Crypto order created. Please complete the transfer using the details on this page.
translation.subDist.paymentPending: Returned to this page. If you have completed payment, relay site activation will finish after the callback is confirmed. Please refresh shortly.
translation.subDist.alreadyOpenTitle: Your relay site is already built
translation.subDist.alreadyOpenDesc: Relay site {{name}} has been activated. Use the same account in the main console to continue setup.
translation.tokens.title: API Keys
translation.tokens.subtitle: Manage your API access tokens
translation.tokens.name: Name
translation.tokens.keyWarning: This is the only time you'll see this key. Copy it now and store it securely.
translation.tokens.noKeysHint: Click a card above to create one
translation.tokens.selectGroupSubtitle: Choose a model group and rate, click a card to create
translation.tokens.defaultGroupDesc: No provider restriction, uses all available channels
translation.tokens.noSupportedModels: No available models for this key
translation.tokens.quickStartComment: # Use your API key with OpenAI-compatible endpoint
translation.tokens.groupPricingSubtitle: Shows anonymous reference prices and price ranges for this group without exposing provider names.
translation.tokens.groupPricingNotice: Actual billing dynamically selects from currently available routes in this group. Prices below are for reference only.
translation.tokens.groupPricingNoData: No reference pricing is available for this group yet.
translation.config.title: Config File Export
translation.config.subtitle: Select your API Key and model to generate config files
translation.config.loginPrompt: Log in to generate your config
translation.config.loginDesc: Select your API Key and model to auto-fill config files
translation.config.noKeyDesc: Config files will be generated once you have a key
translation.config.apiUrlHint: After creating an API key, you can connect directly with the Base URLs below. Click any address to copy it.
translation.config.currentToolApiUrl: Recommended Base URL for current tool
translation.config.ccswitchHint: Pick the destination app and import into CC Switch directly without switching the export tool first.
translation.config.ccswitchNotInstalledDesc: If CC Switch already opened, you can ignore this. Otherwise, install it first and try the quick import again.
translation.downloads.title: Quick Installers
translation.downloads.subtitle: Common client installers are served through this site via /downloads, avoiding direct browser jumps to GitHub releases and improving reliability for restricted networks.
translation.pricing.title: Model Pricing
translation.pricing.subtitle: Transparent, pay-as-you-go pricing for all available models. Prices shown per 1M tokens.
translation.packages.title: Packages & Plans
translation.packages.subtitle: Choose a package that fits your usage. All plans include access to all available models.
translation.packages.noPackages: No packages available at the moment.
translation.packages.insufficientBalance: Insufficient balance. Please top up before subscribing.
translation.packages.subscriptionInfo: This is a subscription ({{period}}), valid for {{days}} days. Each period grants {{symbol}}{{amount}} quota. Unused quota expires.
translation.common.sessionExpired: Session expired, please log in again
translation.topup.title: Top Up
translation.topup.subtitle: Recharge your account balance via online payment or redemption code
translation.topup.customAmountHint: Custom amounts are automatically aligned to payable tiers so the entered and charged amounts stay consistent.
translation.topup.redeemHint: Use an existing redemption code to add balance to your account.
translation.topup.redeemShopHint: Need a code? Buy a top-up redemption code first, then redeem it here.
translation.topup.cryptoSelectionHint: Choose the blockchain and token first, then click the button below to generate a payment address.
translation.topup.inviteSubtitle: Invite friends and earn ongoing rewards
translation.topup.withdrawSubtitle: Submit a payout request with your preferred payment method
translation.topup.withdrawRemarkPlaceholder: Enter your payout account or extra notes
translation.topup.invalidWithdrawAmount: Please enter a valid withdrawal amount
translation.topup.withdrawExceedsBalance: Withdrawal amount cannot exceed your withdrawable balance
translation.topup.currentCommissionRateDesc: All regular users get a default {{rate}}% referral reward. Payout and settlement follow the current promotion rules.
translation.topup.kolApplyTitle: Apply for a Higher Reward Rate
translation.topup.kolApplyDesc: Your default reward rate is {{rate}}%. If you have promotion resources, you can submit your profile to apply for a higher partner rate.
translation.topup.kolPendingDesc: Your request has been submitted. If approved, your reward rate will be updated.
translation.topup.kolApprovedDesc: You are currently using a custom reward rate approved through review.
translation.topup.kolRejectedFallback: The request was not approved yet. You can improve your materials and apply again.
translation.topup.kolApplyModalTitle: Apply for a Higher Reward Rate
translation.topup.kolApplyModalDesc: Submit your promotion profile and your reward rate will be updated after approval.
translation.topup.kolSocialPlaceholder: Enter your profile, channel, or account link
translation.topup.kolPlanPlaceholder: Tell us how you plan to promote this site
translation.topup.kolApplySuccess: Application submitted. Please wait for review.
translation.logs.title: Call Logs
translation.logs.subtitle: View detailed records of every API call
translation.tasks.title: Task Records
translation.tasks.subtitle: View submitted video and image generation tasks, progress, and results
